messages.message: An interface declaring no members is equivalent to its supertype.

suggestions.desc: Replace empty interface with a type alias.

messages.message:
Error: Cannot access variable before it is declared

`dismiss` is accessed before it is declared, which prevents the earlier access from updating when this value changes over time.

C:\Users\HP\Desktop\my portfolio\components\ui\Toast.tsx:31:26
  29 |         const id = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 9)
  30 |         setToasts((prev) => [...prev, { id, title, description, type }])
> 31 |         setTimeout(() => dismiss(id), 5000)
     |                          ^^^^^^^ `dismiss` accessed before it is declared
  32 |     }, [])
  33 |
  34 |     const dismiss = React.useCallback((id: string) => {

C:\Users\HP\Desktop\my portfolio\components\ui\Toast.tsx:34:5
  32 |     }, [])
  33 |
> 34 |     const dismiss = React.useCallback((id: string) => {
     |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 35 |         setToasts((prev) => prev.filter((t) => t.id !== id))
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 36 |     }, [])
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^ `dismiss` is declared here
  37 |
  38 |     return (
  39 |         <ToastContext.Provider value={{ toasts, toast, dismiss }}>
React Hook React.useCallback has a missing dependency: 'dismiss'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [dismiss]
